name: SK-II Genoptics CC Primer
pros: Iconic luxury primer with proven brightening effect from Pitera
Works as both skincare and makeup base, reducing routine steps
Excellent for humid Japan climate—controls shine without feeling heavy
cons: Premium pricing at ¥9,900 for 30g is steep compared to Western equivalents
Fragrance and some actives may irritate sensitive skin types
shortDescription: Luxe CC primer that brightens and smooths—a Japanese skincare staple.
review: SK-II's Genoptics CC Primer is the gold standard for those willing to invest in a multi-tasking base. It genuinely brightens under makeup and feels lightweight in Tokyo's humidity. However, the ¥9,900 price tag demands commitment; foreigners should test at a department store first, as the fragrance doesn't work for everyone. Widely available at Isetan, Mitsukoshi, and online.
